description: CompositionBlack and yellow printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neckline, multi-coloured placket around the neckline, extending to the chest with sequins and lace, short sleeves with sequins on the cuffs and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe neckline, placket and cuffs on this kurti from biba are decorated with beautiful and subtly stylish sequin work while the feathered Mexican print adds an interesting edge. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurti up by wearing bold earrings and bangles.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
